title: Genomics
description: The Genomics module integrates genomic data with clinical records to support precision medicine research. Researchers can upload and annotate VCF files, explore variant data, and leverage the Tumor Board analysis workflow to correlate genomic findings with clinical outcomes.
tips: Use the VCF Upload & Annotation workflow to standardize variant data before linking it to patient clinical records.
Apply cohort definitions to filter the genomic dataset to patients with relevant clinical phenotypes prior to variant analysis.
Leverage the Tumor Board module to present integrated genomic and clinical data in multidisciplinary review sessions.
Ensure genomic data access is governed by appropriate consent and data use agreements before conducting cross-modal analyses.
Annotate variants with clinical significance classifications to prioritize findings in downstream research and clinical workflows.
